episodes.title: Former Nebraska Gov. Bob Kerrey resigns from company's board after Epstein ties discovered
episodes.description:
Former Nebraska Gov. and U.S. Sen. Bob Kerrey resigned from a Lincoln-based company's board after an alleged connection to Jeffrey Epstein.

KETV is your home for Nebraska breaking news and weather. For your latest Nebraska news and weather visit: https://www.ketv.com/
